name: NameHash
summary: Contains information that is useful to uniquely identify an object name. RemarksThis object is immutable.

constructors.name: NameHash(NameHash)
constructors.summary: Constructs a copy of a content hash.

params.name: other
params.doc: The other content hash to copy.

constructors.name: NameHash(String)
constructors.summary: Creates a new NameHash, representing a piece of text.

params.name: name
params.doc: A name. This can be null and can refer to a non-existing path.

constructors.name: NameHash(String, Guid)
constructors.summary: Creates a new NameHash, representing a piece of text.

params.name: name
params.doc: A name. This can be null and can refer to a non-existing path.

params.name: parentId
params.doc: The id of the parent layer. This is only useful with layers.

constructors.name: NameHash(String, Guid, ModelComponentType)
constructors.signature: public NameHash(string name, Guid parentId, ModelComponentType type)
constructors.summary: Creates a new NameHash, representing a piece of text.

params.name: name
params.doc: A name. This can be null and can refer to a non-existing path.

params.name: parentId
params.doc: The id of the parent layer. This is only useful with layers.

params.name: type
params.doc: Calls ModelComponentTypeIgnoresCase(ModelComponentType) to determine if case should be used in search.

constructors.name: NameHash(String, Guid, Boolean)
constructors.signature: public NameHash(string name, Guid parentId, bool ignoreCase)
constructors.summary: Creates a new NameHash, representing a piece of text.

params.name: name
params.doc: A name. This can be null and can refer to a non-existing path.

params.name: parentId
params.doc: The id of the parent layer. This is only useful with layers.

params.name: ignoreCase
params.doc: All manifest searches currently ignore case, except for groups.

methods.name: Clone
methods.summary: Creates a copy of this name hash. Because content hash is immutable, this can be used as a deep copy.

returns.doc: A different instance of the same name hash.

methods.name: CreateFilePathHash
methods.summary: Creates a new NameHash, representing the name of a file.

params.name: path
params.doc: A path. This can be null and can refer to a non-existing path.

methods.name: Equals(NameHash)
methods.summary: Determines if another name hash has the same value.

params.name: other
params.doc: The other name hash to compare.

returns.doc: True if the two hashes are equal.

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.summary: Determines if another object is a name hash with same value.

params.name: obj
params.doc: The other content hash to compare.

returns.doc: True if the two hashes are equal.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Gets an hash code for this name hash. Two equal content hashes have equal hash code. The other way around might not be true.

methods.name: Equality
methods.signature: public static bool operator ==(NameHash left, NameHash right)
methods.summary: Determines if two NameHash instances are equal by value.

returns.doc: True if they are equal by value, otherwise false.

methods.name: Inequality
methods.signature: public static bool operator !=(NameHash left, NameHash right)
methods.summary: Determines if two NameHash instances are different by value.

returns.doc: True if they are different by value, otherwise false.

properties.name: MappedCodePoints
properties.summary: Gets the NameHash flags. In some cases = number of mapped code points.

properties.name: ParentId
properties.summary: Only useful if this participates in a tree structure, as with layers.

properties.name: Sha1Hash
properties.summary: Gets the 20-bytes long SHA-1 hash of ordinal minimum mapped Unicode (UTF-32) code points.
